events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need parse scenario. It says progress photos show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference ACI 347. We need assess field condition. No specific defects described. Component condition categories none flagged. So likely pass, rough-complete, low risk, percent complete maybe 100? But remaining cleanup/follow-on outside checkpoint. The checkpoint scope finished. So percent_complete for this scope = 100. component_conditions empty. findings maybe none. actions none. rationale: scope complete per photos, only incidental cleanup remains, no visible defects/non-compliance under ACI 347. references ACI 347. Need include all fields. value 0. sound_source empty? Schema says component or source of sound when asked; not asked, maybe empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. confidence maybe 0.9. risk low. decision pass. Ensure valid JSON.
